records.previous_price: Claude Opus 4.7 promotional pricing: 7.5 premium request multiplier
records.summary: GitHub updated Claude Opus 4.7 Copilot billing from the promotional 7.5x multiplier to 15x after April 30.

records.previous_price: Normal included Codex usage on the Pro plan
records.current_price: Double normal Codex usage on the Pro plan until May 31, 2026
records.summary: OpenAI lists a temporary doubling of normal Codex usage on the Pro plan, which lowers effective per-task cost for heavy Codex users during the promo window.

records.previous_price: Plus plan reported at $8/user/month with AI as a separate add-on
records.current_price: Plus plan reported at $10/user/month with Notion AI bundled
records.summary: Notion Plus became more expensive while bundling AI features into the core plan.
ElevenLabs kept the Starter price but raised included character quota, reducing effective cost per character.

records.previous_price: Pro plan with 8GB included database size
records.current_price: Pro plan with 16GB included database size
records.summary: Supabase kept Pro pricing stable while doubling included database size.
